modules.sql: WITH primary_phone AS (SELECT customer_id, phone_number, ifw_effective_date, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id, ifw_effective_date ORDER BY phone_id) AS rn FROM phone_numbers), primary_email AS (SELECT customer_id, email_address, ifw_effective_date, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id, ifw_effective_date ORDER BY email_id) AS rn FROM email_addresses), customer_segs AS (SELECT cs.customer_id, cs.ifw_effective_date, GROUP_CONCAT(s.segment_name) AS segments FROM customers_segments cs INNER JOIN segments s ON cs.segment_id = s.segment_id AND cs.ifw_effective_date = s.ifw_effective_date GROUP BY cs.customer_id, cs.ifw_effective_date) SELECT CAST(c.id AS INTEGER) AS customer_id, COALESCE(c.first_name, '') AS first_name, COALESCE(c.last_name, '') AS last_name, CAST(strftime('%Y', c.ifw_effective_date) AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', c.birthdate) AS INTEGER) - CASE WHEN strftime('%m-%d', c.birthdate) > strftime('%m-%d', c.ifw_effective_date) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS age, CASE WHEN (CAST(strftime('%Y', c.ifw_effective_date) AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', c.birthdate) AS INTEGER) - CASE WHEN strftime('%m-%d', c.birthdate) > strftime('%m-%d', c.ifw_effective_date) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) < 26 THEN '18-25' WHEN (CAST(strftime('%Y', c.ifw_effective_date) AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', c.birthdate) AS INTEGER) - CASE WHEN strftime('%m-%d', c.birthdate) > strftime('%m-%d', c.ifw_effective_date) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) <= 35 THEN '26-35' WHEN (CAST(strftime('%Y', c.ifw_effective_date) AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', c.birthdate) AS INTEGER) - CASE WHEN strftime('%m-%d', c.birthdate) > strftime('%m-%d', c.ifw_effective_date) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) <= 45 THEN '36-45' WHEN (CAST(strftime('%Y', c.ifw_effective_date) AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', c.birthdate) AS INTEGER) - CASE WHEN strftime('%m-%d', c.birthdate) > strftime('%m-%d', c.ifw_effective_date) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) <= 55 THEN '46-55' WHEN (CAST(strftime('%Y', c.ifw_effective_date) AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', c.birthdate) AS INTEGER) - CASE WHEN strftime('%m-%d', c.birthdate) > strftime('%m-%d', c.ifw_effective_date) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) <= 65 THEN '56-65' ELSE '65+' END AS age_bracket, COALESCE(pp.phone_number, '') AS primary_phone, COALESCE(pe.email_address, '') AS primary_email, COALESCE(csg.segments, '') AS segments, c.ifw_effective_date FROM customers c LEFT JOIN primary_phone pp ON c.id = pp.customer_id AND c.ifw_effective_date = pp.ifw_effective_date AND pp.rn = 1 LEFT JOIN primary_email pe ON c.id = pe.customer_id AND c.ifw_effective_date = pe.ifw_effective_date AND pe.rn = 1 LEFT JOIN customer_segs csg ON c.id = csg.customer_id AND c.ifw_effective_date = csg.ifw_effective_date ORDER BY c.id
